title: 低開発国と観光業①（肯定）
prompt: More and more people travel to undeveloped countries for holidays. Is this a positive or negative development for the host country?
prompt_jp: 休暇で低開発国を訪れる人が増えている。これは受入国にとって肯定的か否定的な変化か。
outline_jp: 理由: 基本設備で遅れを取っている
例: 自然美は無比で観光客を惹きつける
意見: 貧困から抜け出す助けになる
model_answer: More and more people travel to undeveloped, pristine countries for new experiences.
This can be seen in a positive light, as tourism is a golden opportunity to modernise their economies.
This is largely because many of these countries are lagging behind in basic facilities.
For example, their natural beauty is second to none, which attracts many visitors.
In my view, tourism can provide well-paying jobs for those in need and help families escape poverty.

synonyms: it is my firm belief that

items.meaning: 原始状態の・自然のままの

items.collocation: be seen in a positive light

items.front: take a turn for the worse
items.collocation: conditions take a turn for the worse

drills.jp: これは肯定的に捉えられる。観光は経済を近代化する絶好の機会だからだ。
drills.model_en: This can be seen in a positive light, as tourism is a golden opportunity to modernise the economy.

drills.jp: これは主に、これらの国が基本設備で遅れを取っているからだ。
drills.model_en: This is largely because these countries are lagging behind in basic facilities.

drills.jp: 私の考えでは、観光は貧しい人々に職を与え、貧困から抜け出す助けになる。
drills.model_en: In my view, tourism gives jobs to those in need and helps families escape poverty.
